dj_text: Oh, we're going from EaggerStunn - Kugledans feat. Geolo G right into Jonny Hefty & Jøden - Vi går aldrig hjem (Officiel Video)! Let's go!
commercial_text: Breaking news from That Pirate Bot DJ — the playlist is in control now. The DJ has been demoted to button-pusher.
recovery_text: We're back. That was NOT a crossover event. That was a dimensional bleed.
title: Jonny Hefty & Jøden - Vi går aldrig hjem (Officiel Video)
